creator: mark@ukug.uk.freebsd.org
text:
Fix a couple of typos in section 4.2.4.2 of the Documentation
	Project Primer.

	A <title> tag is ended with </para>

	Also, just to be pedantic, although Nik is English the example
	text is from the US Constitution so "defence" should be "defense".

How-To-Repeat: 
	Read the FDP Primer
